basic_details.job_title: BRIC THSTI Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 11 Assistant Data manager, Project Technical Support and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: BRIC Translational Health Science and Technology Institute
basic_details.post_name: Project Technical Support III, Project Research Scientist II (Medical), Project Research Scientist I, Project Research Scientist I (Medical), Assistant Data Manager
basic_details.short_information: The BRIC Translational Health Science and Technology Institute (THSTI) has officially announced the Recruitment 2026 for 11 vacancies, including Project Technical Support III, Project Research Scientist II (Medical), Project Research Scientist-I, Project Research Scientist I (Medical), and Assistant Data Manager posts. The recruitment is being conducted under Advertisement No. THS/RN/11/2026 on a project-based basis. Candidates possessing qualifications in Life Sciences, Medicine, Veterinary Sciences, Dentistry, Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, Data Science, Bioinformatics, or relate

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Project Technical Support III: Maximum 35 years. Age relaxation applicable as per rules. Project Research Scientist II (Medical): Maximum 40 years. Age relaxation applicable as per rules. Project Research Scientist I: Maximum 35 years. Age relaxation applicable as per rules. Project Research Scientist I (Medical): Maximum 35 years. Age relaxation applicable as per rules. Assistant Data Manager: Maximum 35 years. Age relaxation applicable as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc, M.Sc, BCA, BDS, BHMS, BAMS, BVSC, MBBS, MVSC, MPH, MS, MD, B.Tech, B.E AND More
qualification.details: Project Technical Support III: Graduate degree in Life Sciences with 3 years experience OR Post-Graduate degree in Life Sciences. Project Research Scientist II (Medical): MBBS/B.V.Sc./BDS with 3 years post-qualification clinical research experience OR MD/MVSc/MDS/MPH with basic degree (MBBS/BVSc/BDS). Project Research Scientist I: Post-Graduation degree (integrated PG degree also accepted) in any branch of Life Sciences. Project Research Scientist I (Medical): MBBS/BDS/BHMS/BAMS. Project Technical Support III (Data related): Graduate degree in Statistics/Mathematics/Computer Science/Data Science/Bioinformatics with 3 years experience in R OR BE/B.Tech in Statistics/Mathematics/Computer Science/Data Science/Bioinformatics OR Post-Graduate degree in Statistics/Mathematics/Computer Science/Data Science/Bioinformatics. Assistant Data Manager: Post Graduate degree in Computer Application/Computer Science/Data Science with at least 2 years post-qualification clinical data management experience OR Graduate degree in Computer Science/Computer Application with at least 4 years post-qualification clinical data management experience OR Graduate degree in any discipline with a computer diploma (min 6 months) and at least 5 years post-qualification clinical data management experience.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 28,000/- plus HRA, Rs. 80,000/- plus HRA, Rs. 56,000/- plus HRA, Rs. 67,000/- plus HRA, Rs. 50,000/-
salary_details.details: Project Technical Support III: Rs. 28,000/- plus HRA Project Research Scientist II (Medical): Rs. 80,000/- plus HRA Project Research Scientist I: Rs. 56,000/- plus HRA Project Research Scientist I (Medical): Rs. 67,000/- plus HRA Assistant Data Manager: Rs. 50,000/-

content_sections.heading: BRIC THSTI Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the BRIC-THSTI Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download BRIC THSTI Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: BRIC THSTI Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Technical Support III: Graduate degree in Life Sciences with 3 years experience OR Post-Graduate degree in Life Sciences. Project Research Scientist II (Medical): MBBS/B.V.Sc./BDS with 3 years post-qualification clinical research experience OR MD/MVSc/MDS/MPH with basic degree (MBBS/BVSc/BDS). Project Research Scientist I: Post-Graduation degree (integrated PG degree also accepted) in any branch of Life Sciences. Project Research Scientist I (Medical): MBBS/BDS/BHMS/BAMS. Project Technical Support III (Data related): Graduate degree in Statistics/Mathematics/Computer Science/Data Science/Bioinformatics with 3 years experience in R OR BE/B.Tech in Statistics/Mathematics/Computer Science/Data Science/Bioinformatics OR Post-Graduate degree in Statistics/Mathematics/Computer Science/Data Science/Bioinformatics. Assistant Data Manager: Post Graduate degree in Computer Application/Computer Science/Data Science with at least 2 years post-qualification clinical data management experience OR Graduate degree in Computer Science/Computer Application with at least 4 years post-qualification clinical data management experience OR Graduate degree in any discipline with a computer diploma (min 6 months) and at least 5 years post-qualification clinical data management experience.

content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

Age relaxation applicable as per rules. Project Research Scientist I: Maximum 35 years. Age relaxation applicable as per rules. Project Research Scientist I (Medical): Maximum 35 years. Age relaxation applicable as per rules. Assistant Data Manager: Maximum 35 years. Age relaxation applicable as per rules.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for BRIC-THSTI Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for BRIC-THSTI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews are scheduled on multiple dates, ranging from 06 July 2026 to 10 July 2026, depending on the specific post.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for BRIC-THSTI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available in BRIC-THSTI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 11 vacancies available for various project-based positions at BRIC-THSTI.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification required for Project Technical Support-III?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for Project Technical Support-III is a Graduate degree in Life Sciences with 3 years of experience or a Post-Graduate degree in Life Sciences.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for Project Research Scientist-II (Medical)?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for Project Research Scientist-II (Medical) is 40 years, with age relaxation applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for Project Research Scientist-I?
faq.answer: The salary offered for Project Research Scientist-I is Rs. 56,000/- plus HRA.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at THSTI, NCR Biotech Science Cluster, 3rd Milestone, Faridabad-Gurugram Expressway, Faridabad – 121001.

faq.question: Q8. Do candidates need to bring original documents for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates must bring all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies for verification.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for BRIC-THSTI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves a Written test/Skill test/Interview.
